title: NovaCRM
summary: AI-assisted CRM that prioritizes leads and drafts follow-up actions.
overview: NovaCRM helps revenue teams prioritize leads and automate follow-ups with AI-assisted workflows.
challenges: Reps wasted time on low-intent leads without clear prioritization.
Follow-up quality varied widely across the sales team.
CRM data was stale because updates happened after calls, not during.
solution: Lead scoring, next-best-action suggestions, and email draft assistance embedded in a customizable CRM workspace.
architectureNote: GraphQL API with AI inference services, activity streams, and integration webhooks for sales tooling.
